high_severity_findings.summary: lastDataAt resets prevent eviction of a stuck writer when the pty stays busy emitting. Track socket drainage (lastSuccessfulSendAt / bufferedThresholdExceededAt), not pty emission.
Naive Buffer→string breaks multi-byte UTF-8 across chunk boundaries. Carry buffer underspecified for CSI vs OSC; truncating at 32 bytes can leak fragments.
high_severity_findings.action: Plan amended — use StringDecoder; carry is protocol-aware (CSI + OSC) with bounded max length; drop incomplete sequence on overflow.

high_severity_findings.summary: Client-side term.onData is for INPUT (terminal→backend), not output. Diagnose via WS-frame capture (server-side or Playwright), not term.onData.
high_severity_findings.action: Plan amended — diagnose via Playwright WS-frame capture only; no client-side debug hook ships.

high_severity_findings.summary: Spec says routes.ts releases writer; plan says PtyManager watchdog. Reconcile.
high_severity_findings.action: Plan amended — PtyManager owns the watchdog. Spec narrative remains coarse; ADR-068-A2 records the precise ownership.

high_severity_findings.summary: Strip-known-cursor-codes is too permissive. CR-only repaints (\r without \n), backspace \b, etc. still corrupt replay.
high_severity_findings.action: Plan amended — persisted format is now 'printable text + LF + tab + SGR + CRLF'; strip bare CR + backspace; preserve LF and CRLF newlines.

high_severity_findings.summary: Verify @hono/node-ws WSContext exposes meaningful bufferedAmount before building on it.
high_severity_findings.action: Plan amended — capability gate added; if undefined, instrument sends in our own wrapper to track backlog ourselves.

medium_severity_findings.action: Plan amended — watchdog detach explicitly clears any pause refcount the evicted conn was holding; per-conn pausedForConn Set restored.
Plan amended — sanitize at read time too. ScrollbackStore.read() runs the same sanitizer over disk bytes, so v0.8.0 files re-attach cleanly without backfill migration.
Plan amended — assert (a) no cursor-control bytes in persisted output, (b) text reads as a linearized log, NOT exact-once dedup count.
Plan amended — add a fixture-driven assertion against the actual diagnosed escape sequence; contrast-matrix becomes supplemental.
Plan amended — writer slot has a monotonic epoch counter; stale ws.close events for an already-evicted conn are no-ops.
Plan amended — audit Spec 73/74/75/76 + EmbeddedTerminal.test for role-timing assumptions before coding AC-3.
Plan amended — debug pathway does NOT ship in app code. Diagnosis runs entirely in Playwright + WS-frame capture (test-only).

low_severity_findings.action: Acknowledged — option A (theme remap) preferred. Option B kept as fallback only if diagnosis reveals a structural collision that can't be remapped.
Plan amended — carry-buffer is protocol-aware: CSI max 32 bytes, OSC max 4096 bytes (covers typical window-title sequences); overflow drops the in-progress sequence and resyncs.
Acknowledged — promotion stays within entry.connSubs (already authorized via task.cwd realpath gate at WS upgrade).
